description_long: This is a vintage, industrial-style metal faucet fixture, likely made from cast iron or steel, with a robust and utilitarian design. The base is rectangular with ornate, embossed text and four sturdy feet, providing stability and a classic appearance. A vertical cylindrical stem rises from the base, supporting a central spout and a round, knurled knob or handle for operation. The spout is short and projects downward, positioned above a circular opening or cup on the base, possibly for guiding water flow or accommodating attachments. A lever extends from the rear of the base, suggesting a mechanical or press action to operate the faucet. The entire fixture has a weathered, matte gray finish, indicative of prolonged outdoor or industrial use.
description: A vintage, industrial metal faucet with a sturdy rectangular base, vertical stem, and a lever-operated mechanism. The fixture features a weathered gray finish and ornate detailing on the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the embossed base, central spout, and the lever extending from the rear.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the ornate base, cylindrical stem, and the alignment of the spout above the circular opening.
description_view_2: Rear-side view emphasizing the lever mechanism and the robust, arched support structure.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the vertical stem, lever, and the overall profile of the faucet's base and spout.
